data.name: DetailPanel_EmptyState
data.value: Select a book to see details

data.name: FilterPanel_SavedSearches_Empty
data.value: No saved searches yet. Use Advanced Search to create one.

data.name: Delete_MultipleBooks_Message
data.value: Delete {0} books? This cannot be undone.

data.name: UnsavedChanges_Body
data.value: You have unsaved changes to "{0}". What would you like to do?

data.name: BookList_NoResults
data.value: No books match your search. Try clearing filters or adjusting your search terms.

data.name: Cover_Placeholder_Tooltip
data.value: Drop an image here, or use the buttons below to attach a cover

data.name: Tooltip_VisibleInCatalog
data.value: When unchecked, this book is hidden from catalog browsing (but still in the database).

data.name: Error_SaveFailed
data.value: Could not save changes. Check that the database is accessible and try again.

data.name: Error_CoverLoadFailed
data.value: Could not load cover image. Re-attach using Browse or drag-and-drop.

data.name: Error_SearchFailed
data.value: Search failed. Try again or restart the application.

data.name: LookupWizard_NoResults
data.value: No results found for this ISBN. Check the number and try again, or enter the book details manually.

data.name: MergeReview_NoConflicts
data.value: No field conflicts — all sources agree.

data.name: BatchQueue_ShutdownWarning_Body
data.value: A batch lookup is still running. Closing now will stop the lookup. Continue?

data.name: Recatalog_NoIsbn_BodyForBook
data.value: "{0}" has no ISBN. Enter one to look up metadata.

data.name: Recatalog_SaveIsbn_Body
data.value: Save ISBN {0} on "{1}"? If not, the ISBN is only used for this lookup.

data.name: ManageLookups_DataCleanupDesc
data.value: The following names have been proposed for correction. Edit Suggested SortName as needed. Uncheck rows to skip. Rows with no change are not shown.

data.name: ManageLookups_ErrorDuplicateName
data.value: A {0} with this name already exists.

data.name: ManageLookups_MergeConfirmBody
data.value: The non-kept person's books will be reassigned to the kept person.

data.name: ManageLookups_MergePickerConfirmHint
data.value: '{0}' will be merged into '{1}' and removed.

data.name: Shutdown_BackupInProgress
data.value: Backing up your library before closing…

data.name: BackupDialog_RemoteFallbackNote
data.value: A remote database has no file backup; the CSV archive is used instead.

data.name: Settings_Database_SavedPasswordHint
data.value: A password is saved for this server — leave blank to keep it.

data.name: ImageEditor_ManageItem_TypePicker_Tooltip
data.value: Reassign to a different image type

data.name: BookList_Thumbnail_Badge_Tooltip
data.value: Duplicate image types — check the Images tab

data.name: Import_Ask_Body
data.value:
A book with the same ISBN already exists:
"{0}"
Overwrite it with the import data?

data.name: Import_Step1_FileWatermark
data.value: Path to backup .zip file or folder...

data.name: Import_Step1_HelpText
data.value: Select a .zip backup created by Readerware's Backup feature, or the extracted backup folder.

data.name: Import_Step2_WarningsHeader
data.value: {0} item(s) flagged during analysis — click to view details

data.name: Import_Step3_HelpText
data.value: Click Import to begin. This operation can be cancelled at any time.

data.name: Import_Step3_Summary
Import_Step5_Cancelled
data.value: Import was cancelled. Partial records have been saved.

data.name: Print_Error_PresetNameDuplicate
data.value: A preset with this name already exists.

data.name: Print_Error_PresetSaveFailed
data.value: Save failed. Changes may not persist after restart.

data.name: Print_ScopeSummary_None
data.value: No books match the current filter. Nothing to print.

data.name: Settings_Advanced_Logging_RestartNote
data.value: Log level change takes effect on next launch.

data.name: Settings_Appearance_RestartNote
data.value: Theme change takes effect on next launch.

data.name: Settings_General_LanguageRestartNote
data.value: Language change takes effect on next launch.

data.name: Settings_Import_ReaderwareToolPathWatermark
data.value: Path to the HSQLDB + Java tool folder

data.name: Settings_Import_ReaderwareToolPathHint
data.value: Folder containing the HSQLDB runtime (jre\bin\java.exe and lib\hsqldb.jar) used to read a live Readerware database directly.

data.name: CsvPicker_Heading
data.value: Select columns to include in the export:

data.name: AppDialog_BackupConflict_Body
data.value: {0} already exists in the backup folder.

data.name: DuplicateIsbn_Body
data.value: A book with ISBN {0} already exists ({1}). Update existing book or add as new?

data.name: RecatalogAll_Confirm
data.value: Re-catalog all {0} books? This may take a while.

data.name: Backup_Failed
data.value: Backup failed: {0}. Check the destination folder and try again.

data.name: Restore_Confirm_Body
data.value: Your current library will be replaced. Choose a location to save a safety copy first.

data.name: Restore_Replace_Body
data.value: This will overwrite your current library with the selected backup. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Restore_Complete_Body
data.value: BookDB will now restart to load the restored library.

data.name: Restore_Failed
data.value: Restore failed: {0}. Your original library was not modified.

data.name: ManageBorrowers_DeleteBlocked
data.value: Cannot delete: this borrower has loan history.

data.name: LoanHistory_EmptyState
data.value: No loan history for this book.

data.name: ReleaseNotes_Prompt_Body
data.value: You are now running version {0}. Do you want to see what's new?

data.name: ReaderwareImport_Intro
data.value: Convert a live Readerware database folder (the .rw4 folder) into a backup that BookDB can import. Your original database is copied first and is never modified.

data.name: ReaderwareImport_ToolPathNote
data.value: Set the HSQLDB + Java tool folder in Settings > Import.

data.name: ReaderwareImport_Success
data.value: Conversion complete: {0} tables exported. Continue to open the import wizard.

data.name: ReaderwareImport_Error_ToolPathInvalid
data.value: The conversion tool was not found. Check the tool folder in Settings > Import (it must contain jre\bin\java.exe and lib\hsqldb.jar).

data.name: ReaderwareImport_Error_DatabaseInvalid
data.value: This folder is not a valid Readerware database. Select the .rw4 folder that contains the database files.

data.name: ReaderwareImport_Error_MainTableMissing
data.value: The database has no Readerware book table, so it cannot be imported.

data.name: ReaderwareImport_Error_ProcessFailed
data.value: The conversion failed. See the progress log for details.

data.name: Import_Step1_CollectionCreateFailed
data.value: Could not create the collection. The name may already be in use.

data.name: Settings_AppAccess_Intro
data.value: Add BookDB to your system so you can launch it without locating the program file.

data.name: Settings_AppAccess_PinHint
data.value: Tip: after the shortcut is created, right-click it to pin BookDB to the taskbar or Start menu.

data.name: Settings_AppAccess_Unsupported
data.value: Adding shortcuts isn't available on this operating system.

data.name: Settings_AppAccess_StatusWingetWarning
data.value: The shortcut was created, but it points to the current install folder and may stop working after a winget update. For an update-proof shortcut, reinstall BookDB from an administrator terminal.

data.name: Settings_AppAccess_StatusFailed
data.value: Could not create the shortcut. See the log for details.

data.name: Maintenance_Intro
data.value: Check your library database for problems and apply safe repairs. A safety backup is created automatically before any repair runs.

data.name: Maintenance_AdviseRestore
data.value: The database reported problems that cannot be repaired in place. Restore from a recent backup to recover your data.

data.name: Maintenance_Status_Ok
data.value: No problems found — the database is healthy.

data.name: Settings_Database_TlsDisableWarning
data.value: Disabling TLS sends the password and data unencrypted across the network. Use it only on a trusted local network.

data.name: Settings_Database_KeyringUnavailable
data.value: A server database needs an operating-system credential store to keep the password safe, but none is available on this machine. BookDB will keep using the local SQLite database.

data.name: Settings_Database_RestartNote
data.value: Switching the database takes effect after BookDB restarts.

data.name: Settings_Database_Apply_PasswordRequired
data.value: Enter the database password before applying.

data.name: Startup_Failure_Intro
data.value: BookDB could not reach the database server.

data.name: Startup_Failure_RetriesExhausted
data.value: Retrying hasn't helped. Check that the server is running and review your connection settings.

data.name: ConnectDialog_Body
data.value: BookDB is already open on {0} (last seen {1}, version {2}).

data.name: ConnectDialog_Risk
data.value: Opening a second client risks data conflicts. Only one client should access this database at a time.

data.name: ConnectDialog_ConnectAnyway
data.value: Connect anyway — I accept the risk

data.name: Settings_RestartConfirm_Body
data.value: Some changes take effect only after a restart. Restart BookDB now?

data.name: Settings_Database_RestartConfirm_Body
data.value: Switching to {0} requires restarting BookDB. The application will close and reopen now. Continue?

data.name: Settings_Database_TestSuccessUninitialized
data.value: Connected — PostgreSQL {0}. No BookDB data found in this database yet.

data.name: Settings_Database_TestSuccessUninitialized_MySql
data.value: Connected — {0}. No BookDB data found in this database yet.

data.name: Settings_Database_TestError_Auth
data.value: Authentication failed — check the username and password.

data.name: Settings_Database_TestError_Refused
data.value: Connection refused — check the host and port, and that the server is running.

data.name: Settings_Database_TestError_Timeout
data.value: Connection timed out — check the host and port, and your network.

data.name: Settings_Database_TestError_Tls
data.value: TLS/SSL error — check the TLS mode and the server's certificate.

data.name: Settings_Database_TestError_UnsupportedVersion
data.value: BookDB requires PostgreSQL {0} or later — this server is {1}.

data.name: Settings_Database_TestError_UnsupportedVersion_MySql
data.value: BookDB requires MySQL {0} or MariaDB {1} or later — this server is {2}.

data.name: ConnectionLost_Body
data.value: The database has been unreachable for several minutes. You can keep waiting while reconnection is retried, or quit the application.

data.name: MoveLibrary_Intro
data.value: Copy the entire library to the other database backend. The current database is the source; choose and check the target before moving. A safety backup is taken automatically before any data is written.

data.name: MoveLibrary_Target_Empty
data.value: Target is empty — ready to receive the library.

data.name: MoveLibrary_Target_HasData
data.value: ⚠ Target already contains {0} books — Move will REPLACE all data.

data.name: MoveLibrary_Acknowledge
data.value: I understand — replace all data in the target database

data.name: MoveLibrary_SwitchActive
data.value: Switch the active database to the target when finished

data.name: MoveLibrary_Complete
data.value: Migration complete — all record counts match.

data.name: MoveLibrary_CountMismatch
data.value: ⚠ Migration finished but record counts do not match; switching the active database is blocked.

data.name: MoveLibrary_Failed
data.value: Migration failed at {0}. The target holds partial data and must not be used. Your data is safe in the backup: {1}

data.name: Restore_UnknownFormat
data.value: The selected file is not a recognised BookDB backup (no library database or CSV archive inside).

data.name: Restore_SqliteIntoRemote
data.value: This is a local SQLite file backup and can't be restored into the current remote database. Use a CSV archive backup, or switch to the local database first.

data.name: Restore_AdoptBackend_Body
data.value: This backup was created on a {0} database. Switch the active database to that connection and restart? Choosing No keeps your current database.

data.name: RestoreTarget_Body
data.value: This backup was created on the database server {0}. Restore the data into that server, or into your current database?

data.name: Restore_NoCredentialsForTarget
data.value: No saved credentials for the backup's database server. Configure it in Settings → Database first, then try again.
